title: SpiderIQ Capabilities Catalog
summary: The full SpiderIQ AI-Native Agency OS capability catalog — 11 surfaces (CMS, dynamic pages with merge tags, lead-gen directories, booking, CRM, workflows, CRO tools, GEO extensions, scraping pipeline, media services, agent surface), 4-class component taxonomy (static / interactive / dynamic / extension), MCP package matrix. Use this whenever the user asks 'what can SpiderIQ do?', 'is there a way to X with SpiderIQ?', 'does SpiderIQ have Y?', 'can SpiderIQ replace Z?', or any capability-discovery question. Read CAPABILITIES.md first, identify which of the 11 surfaces answers the question, then recommend the specific tool, recipe, or example file that delivers it.
